name: tts-1.5-mini
description: Ultra-fast, cost-efficient text-to-speech with ~120ms latency and 15-language support

speaking_rate.description: Speaking speed multiplier. Set to 0 for normal speed (1.0).
speaking_rate.title: Speaking Rate

temperature.description: Controls randomness when generating audio. Higher values produce more expressive results, lower values are more deterministic.
temperature.title: Temperature

text.description: The text to convert to speech. Maximum 2,000 characters. Supports SSML break tags for pauses (e.g. `<break time="1s" />`), emotion markups (e.g. `[happy]`, `[sad]`), and non-verbal vocalizations (e.g. `[laugh]`, `[sigh]`).
text.title: Text

text_normalization.description: Controls whether numbers, dates, and abbreviations are expanded before synthesis. 'auto' lets the model decide, 'on' always normalizes, 'off' reads text as-is.
text_normalization.title: text_normalization

voice_id.description: The voice to use. Use a preset voice name (e.g. 'Ashley', 'Dennis', 'Alex') or a custom cloned voice ID.
voice_id.title: Voice Id
